primary_catalyst.description: Continuation of 10-day+ winning streak following TSMC Apr 16 earnings blowout (+58% profit, $35.6B revenue, 61% HPC mix, 'AI demand exceptionally strong'). Low volume (-0.12 vol z). Drift higher; no discrete NVDA catalyst day-of, but TSMC earnings the prior day continued to feed the rally.

secondary_catalysts.description: CNN: oil drops, stocks soar to wrap up a wild week post-ceasefire
